case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS HARRIS JACKIE

ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS JACKIE
